_comment: Product defaults: normal public/authorized/internal sources use auto; judicial/government strong-risk sources use assisted; abnormal/prohibited sources use blocked. Advanced users may override any source type or source id. If changing a safer default to auto, set riskAcknowledged=true after confirming authorization, compliance, and account-risk acceptance.

search:bing.note: Example source-level override. Source ids can be found in audit logs.

judicial:example-authorized-test.note: Example only. Use auto for high-risk sources only when the user confirms authorization and compliance responsibility.
